Recover Account
🔑
Restore your progress
Enter your school code and the recovery code you saved when you set up your account. Your scores, stages and history will return.
Save your recovery code
🔑
This is your recovery code
If you ever lose your phone, you can restore everything — your scores, your stages, all your progress — using this code.
Your Recovery Code
XXXX-XXXX
Keep this safe. Anyone with this code AND your school code can take over your account.
How to save it:
• Take a screenshot of this screen
• Or write it on the back cover of your exercise book
• Or ask your parent/teacher to keep a copy

WAEC / JAMB
Practice questions written to match WAEC/JAMB difficulty. Not actual past papers.
Mathematics
📖 Learn by Topic
Start with a concept explanation, then practise questions on that topic. Great for building understanding from scratch.
📚 Practice Mode
Answer at your own pace. See the worked solution after each question. No time pressure. Best for learning.
⏱️ CBT Mock Exam
40 questions, 40-minute timer, no going back. Simulates the JAMB UTME. Topic-by-topic score breakdown at the end.
🎯 Topic Drill
Practise just one topic for focused review.
